_comment: Pinned bundled mining engines for the Alice Miner. Each entry records the engine kind, target triple, on-disk filename, and the SHA-256 of the committed bytes so the resolver / packaging can verify integrity. The macOS arm64 xmrig (CPU-XMR lane) is PROVEN/live-validated against hk.aliceprotocol.org:3333. The kawpowminer (GPU-RVN/KawPoW lane) entries carry a PLACEHOLDER sha256 of all-zeros: the real binaries + their pinned SHAs are obtained at packaging time (M7). KawPowMiner is GPL-3.0, 0% fee, NVIDIA+AMD, cross-OS (PLAN section 6 D-GPU-miner); T-Rex is supported only via the ALICE_MINER_GPU_BIN override, never bundled. If a GPU binary is absent at runtime the resolver fails gracefully with a clear 'GPU miner not installed' status (no panic) and the RVN lane stays unavailable.

engines.source: PLACEHOLDER — KawPowMiner (GPL-3.0) Linux x86_64 build, pinned + signed at packaging (M7). RVN lane live-tested later on an NVIDIA box.
PLACEHOLDER — KawPowMiner (GPL-3.0) Windows x86_64 build, pinned + signed at packaging (M7). Windows is GPU-first (no bundled xmrig).
